data.title: Tim Cook Engages With China's IT Minister As iPhone Maker Aims To Enhance Local User Experience With Apple Intelligence
data.description: In a bid to strengthen Apple Inc.'s position in China, CEO Tim Cook recently met with the country's Minister for Industry and Information Technology, Jin Zhuanglong.

data.title: Jamie Dimon Reportedly Supports Kamala Harris Behind Closed Doors, But Maintains Silence In The Public
data.description: Jamie Dimon, CEO of JPMorgan Chase, has reportedly privately expressed support for Kamala Harris while avoiding public endorsement due to fears of retaliation from Donald Trump.

data.title: Spirit Airlines Stock Jumps Over 16% In After-Hours Trading Amid Frontier's Renewed Merger Interest: Report
data.description: Frontier Group Holdings Inc. is reportedly considering the possibility of a renewed acquisition of Spirit Airlines Inc. amid the latter's ongoing discussions with bondholders over a potential bankruptcy filing.

data.title: Peter Schiff Predicts A 'Bloodbath' For MicroStrategy Stock, Calls It The Most Overvalued On MSCI World Index
data.description: Influential economist Peter Schiff predicted a crash for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) development company MicroStrategy Inc. (NASDAQ:MSTR), terming it the most overvalued stock in the MSCI World Index.

data.title: Cathie Wood-Led Ark Dumps $5.8M Worth Of Robinhood Shares Amid Forecasts Of A Potential Rally From Analysts
data.description: On Tuesday, Cathie Wood's Ark Invest sold 210,483 shares of Robinhood Markets Inc., worth approximately $5.8 million, alongside key trades involving Moderna, Tempus AI, CRISPR Therapeutics, and Cerus Corp.
